headline: GE Aerospace Contracts Add Context To General Electric Valuation And Momentum
summary: GE Aerospace, part of General Electric (NYSE:GE), is working with Kratos Defense on the GEK1500, a next generation small jet engine for collaborative combat aircraft under a U.S. Air Force contract. The company is also continuing its partnership with Starfighters Space on the STARLAUNCH 1 suborbital launch system, aimed at advancing commercial spaceflight propulsion. These agreements extend GE Aerospace's role in unmanned military aircraft and commercial suborbital launch projects. For...
